legal_description.value: Lot 61, SEVILLE PARCEL 3, according to Book 554 of Maps, Page 19, and Affidavit of Correction recorded in Instrument No. 01-849180, and in Instrument No. 01-984501, records of Maricopa County, Arizona
legal_description.source_note: Visually read from DOT body, page 3. Recorded DOT contains two typos in the legal description: 'SEVELLE PARCEL 3' (should be SEVILLE) and 'MAPRICOPA COUNTY' (should be MARICOPA). These are real title-defect artifacts — a production title examiner would flag these as scrivener's errors. The value here is normalized to the correct spelling; the typos are preserved in this source_note.

loan_number.source_note: Loan # stated on Adjustable Rate Rider header, page 12

min_number.source_note: MERS Identification Number below DEED OF TRUST title, page 1

property_address.source_note: Property address stated in DOT body, page 3

pud_name.source_note: Planned Unit Development name in PUD Rider, page 17. Confirms Seville HOA covenants bind this lot.

vesting.value: A Married Woman as her Sole and Separate Property

loan_product.value: LIBOR One-Year Index Adjustable Rate, Interest First/Only
loan_product.source_note: Adjustable Rate Rider header, page 12. Interest-only ARM is a classic pre-crash subprime/Alt-A loan product.

initial_interest_rate.source_note: Initial rate stated in Adjustable Rate Rider Section A, page 12

first_rate_change.source_note: First change date stated in Adjustable Rate Rider Section 4(A), page 12

rate_cap.source_note: Maximum interest rate from Adjustable Rate Rider Section 4(D), page 13

margin.value: 2.250 percentage points over LIBOR One-Year Index
margin.source_note: Rate margin from Adjustable Rate Rider Section 4(C), page 13

lender_dba.value: America's Wholesale Lender (dba for Countrywide Home Loans, Inc.)
lender_dba.source_note: Lender dba stated page 1. 'America's Wholesale Lender' was Countrywide's wholesale origination channel.

corpus_boundary_note: County online records searched through 2026-04-09. Lifecycle remains open in the curated corpus: no release, substitution of trustee, notice of sale, or subsequent refinance DOT has been located for this 2007 Countrywide Interest-Only ARM. Countrywide was acquired by Bank of America in 2008; any downstream assignment or release would typically be executed by Bank of America Home Loans or a successor servicer. A targeted Phase 2 probe of 2020–2021 refinance-era recording numbers was not productive — see R-007 for Known Gap #2 search-limitation context.
mers_note: MERS is beneficiary of record as nominee for Countrywide Home Loans, Inc. dba America's Wholesale Lender — Countrywide's wholesale origination channel. This is a pre-crash 2007 interest-only adjustable-rate mortgage (LIBOR One-Year Index + 2.250% margin; initial 6.375%, cap 12.375%; first rate reset 2010-08-01). Interest-only ARMs from Countrywide are a signature product of the 2006–2008 subprime lending era and drove significant 2008–2011 foreclosure activity. Countrywide was acquired by Bank of America in July 2008; any servicing transfer or note assignment would typically occur outside the public record via the MERS system. The note may currently be held by Bank of America Home Loans, a successor servicer, or a securitization trust.
